explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Known set effects were included.
Set bonus active: Blizzard Overture Set at 2 pieces (5/5 equipped).
Set bonus active: Blizzard Overture Set at 4 pieces (5/5 equipped).
Set bonus active: Deathless One at 2 pieces (5/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Deathless One at 4 pieces (5/6 equipped).

Heroic Calanthia's Aegis of Dominance: Effect 1: Cooldown Speed +20% — feeds #2 Cooldown Speed; alternatives: Strength +20, Dexterity +20, Wisdom +20. Effect 2: Wisdom +20 — improves no ranked goal; kept as a deterministic tie-breaker; alternatives: Strength +20, Dexterity +20, Perception +20.

Heroic Shackled Twilight: Effect 1: Cooldown Speed +11% — feeds #2 Cooldown Speed; alternatives: Strength +11, Dexterity +11, Perception +11. Effect 2: Perception +11 — improves no ranked goal; kept as a deterministic tie-breaker; alternatives: Strength +11, Dexterity +11, Fortitude +11. Effect 3: Strength +11 — improves no ranked goal; kept as a deterministic tie-breaker; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Perception +11, Fortitude +11.
Main Hand: Defense Assist Attack supplies +4 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Off Hand: Defense Assist Attack supplies +4 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Head: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Hands: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Assist Defense Attack supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Assist Attack Defense supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Healing: 20493.55 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.454.
Cooldown Speed: 15330 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.085.
Buff Duration: 11000 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.011.
Mana Regen: 2514200 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.006.
Max Health: 35008.74 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.004; minimum 35000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Wand mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Sword mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
